name: Running out
short_description: In this fast-paced platformer, every run is a race against time. Push your limits, speed through levels, and go further with upgrades that keep you in the game. Sharpen your skills, optimize your runs, and reach the finish before it’s too late. Fast, intense, and addictive, can you beat the clock?
detailed_description:
Run, upgrade, repeat!

Running Out is a fast-paced platformer where every second counts. Time is limited, but each run brings you closer to victory. Progress, upgrade your abilities, and optimize every move to go further and further.

An addictive challenge

Each level is a race against the clock. Your first attempts will be short—very short—but every run unlocks upgrades that push your limits. More speed? Higher jumps? A dash?

Every choice shapes your progress.

Pure adrenaline

  • Tight and responsive platforming mechanics

  • An addictive gameplay loop based on constant improvement

  • A challenge that rewards reflexes and optimization

  • A clean, readable style perfect for high-speed action

How far can you go before time runs out? ⏳🔥
